subject: The Rani Membership: Your Skin Deserves a Long-Term Plan
preheader: Exclusive member pricing, priority booking, and a personalized treatment plan designed around your goals.
htmlContent:
RANI

BEAUTY CLINIC

Beautiful Results Are Built Over Time

{{first_name}},

The most radiant, healthy skin we see at Rani belongs to patients who treat their aesthetics as an ongoing practice—not a one-time event. Consistent treatments, spaced at the right intervals, produce results that single sessions simply cannot match.

That is why we created the Rani Membership—a program designed for patients who are committed to long-term results and want the best value for their investment in themselves.

Membership Benefits

Exclusive Member Pricing
Preferred rates on all treatments and services
Monthly Treatment Credit
A dedicated monthly credit applied toward the treatments of your choice
Priority Booking
First access to new appointment slots, including high-demand times
Personalized Treatment Plan
A customized roadmap designed by your clinician based on your goals and skin assessment
Complimentary Annual Skin Analysis
A comprehensive yearly assessment to track your progress and adjust your plan
Early Access to New Services
Be the first to experience new treatments added to our menu

How It Works

Membership is a simple monthly commitment. Your treatment credit accumulates and can be used for any service at Rani. There are no long-term contracts—you can adjust or pause your membership at any time with 30 days' notice.

Most members find that their membership savings cover 2-4 additional treatments per year compared to paying per visit.

Join the Rani Membership and invest in results that last.

LEARN MORE & JOIN

Have questions about membership? Reply to this email or call us directly. We are happy to walk you through the details.

Rani Beauty Clinic | Washington State

Unsubscribe | Update Preferences

The most radiant, healthy skin we see at Rani belongs to patients who treat their aesthetics as an ongoing practice -- not a one-time event. Consistent treatments, spaced at the right intervals, produce results that single sessions simply cannot match.
